# .reviewbot.md

<!-- Auto-generated by AI ReviewBot. Feel free to edit. -->

## Stack
- **Language:** Rust 1.78
- **Framework:** Actix Web
- **Package manager:** cargo

## Automated Checks
- **Linting:** clippy
- **Formatting:** rustfmt
- **Testing:** cargo test

## Review Guidance

### Skip (CI handles these)
- Code style (handled by clippy)
- Formatting (handled by rustfmt)

### Focus
- Unsafe code usage
- Memory safety patterns

### Conventions
- Use thiserror for error types
- Prefer &str over String in function arguments
